creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
We use PGSQL  9.6. I had to patch QGIS (recent version from ports) to use postgis22 rather than postgis21. I'd like to see the proposed framework. It is a pain in the ass having to different PostgreSQL installations on the same host - if even possible - when one preferes most recent PostgreSQL version.

It is even more complicated on poudriere: setting DEFAULT_VERSION+= to PostgreSQL 9.6, nails down ALL ports to that version - as desired.
